nasb.text: “He who kidnaps a man, whether he sells him or he is found in his possession, shall surely be put to death.

esv.text: “Whoever steals a man and sells him, and anyone found in possession of him, shall be put to death.

cnv.text: “拐帶人口的，無論是把人賣了，或是還留在他手中，必要把那人處死。

ccb.text: 绑架他人贩卖或自用的，必须被处死。
